items.question_zh: 是否已有测试/日志/CI 给循环『眼睛』，否则不要无人值守运行？
items.question_en: Are tests/logs/CI present to give the loop eyes — else do not run it unattended?

items.question_zh: 验收检查本地确实能跑起来并返回 pass/fail？
items.question_en: Does the acceptance check actually run locally and return pass/fail?

items.question_zh: 是否在沙箱/最小权限/dev-only 凭据下运行？
items.question_en: Is it running under sandbox / least privilege / dev-only credentials?

items.question_zh: 改动是否可回滚（worktree/分支），随时能丢弃？
items.question_en: Are changes reversible (worktree/branch) and discardable at any time?

items.question_zh: 是否设了最大轮数与 token/成本预算上限？
items.question_en: Are max-iterations and a token/cost budget cap set?

items.question_zh: 改动范围是否被约束，且无关文件被排除？
items.question_en: Is the change scope bounded and unrelated files excluded?

items.question_zh: 危险/不可逆命令是否需要人工确认？
items.question_en: Do destructive/irreversible commands require human confirmation?
